sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46975" key="h(meri/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμερίδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἥμερος</etym>) of wine, <sense id="n46975.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mild, mellow</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.663d</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">692e</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n46975.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> epith. of Dionysus, as patron of the <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cultivated</tr_> vine (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἡμερίς</etym>), ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">451c</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">994a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
